---
title: "API Reference"
subtitle: "All 21 public functions in the `etf_iv` package"
---

The `etf_iv` package exposes 21 functions organized into four modules.
Every function accepts and returns `pd.DataFrame` objects and raises
`ValueError` on invalid input.

```python
import etf_iv
# or import individual functions:
from etf_iv import load_price_history, compute_iv_skew
```

---

## Bundled Loaders

Load pre-collected CSV data bundled with the package. Works completely
offline — no network access or API keys required.

[Full reference →](loaders.qmd)

| Function | Returns | Description |
|:---------|:--------|:------------|
| [`load_price_history()`](loaders.qmd#load_price_history) | `DataFrame` | 6-month OHLCV for VOO, QQQ, ARKQ, BOTZ |
| [`load_options_chain()`](loaders.qmd#load_options_chain) | `DataFrame` | Full options chain (all expirations, cleaned) |
| [`load_options_filtered()`](loaders.qmd#load_options_filtered) | `DataFrame` | Liquidity-filtered options with spot and moneyness |
| [`load_etf_holdings()`](loaders.qmd#load_etf_holdings) | `DataFrame` | Top-25 holdings per ETF |
| [`load_earnings_dates()`](loaders.qmd#load_earnings_dates) | `DataFrame` | Next earnings dates for ETF holdings |
| [`load_etf_sentiment()`](loaders.qmd#load_etf_sentiment) | `DataFrame` | Claude-scored news sentiment (1–5 scale) |

---

## Live Collection

Fetch fresh data from yfinance, stockanalysis.com, or the Anthropic API.
Requires network access; sentiment functions additionally require
`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

[Full reference →](collection.qmd)

| Function | Returns | Description |
|:---------|:--------|:------------|
| [`get_price_history(ticker, period)`](collection.qmd#get_price_history) | `DataFrame` | Download OHLCV for a single ticker |
| [`get_options_chain(ticker)`](collection.qmd#get_options_chain) | `DataFrame` | Fetch all listed options across every expiration |
| [`get_etf_holdings(ticker)`](collection.qmd#get_etf_holdings) | `DataFrame` | Scrape top holdings and weights |
| [`get_etf_headlines(ticker, max_articles)`](collection.qmd#get_etf_headlines) | `list[str]` | Fetch recent news headlines via yfinance |
| [`get_sentiment_score(ticker, headlines)`](collection.qmd#get_sentiment_score) | `int` | Score headlines 1–5 with Claude tool use |

---

## Cleaning

Standardize, filter, and enrich raw DataFrames before analysis. All
functions return a cleaned copy without mutating the input.

[Full reference →](cleaning.qmd)

| Function | Returns | Description |
|:---------|:--------|:------------|
| [`clean_prices(df)`](cleaning.qmd#clean_prices) | `DataFrame` | Standardize raw price-history DataFrame |
| [`clean_options(df)`](cleaning.qmd#clean_options) | `DataFrame` | Standardize raw options chain |
| [`filter_liquidity(df, min_volume, min_open_interest)`](cleaning.qmd#filter_liquidity) | `DataFrame` | Remove illiquid option contracts |
| [`add_spot_and_moneyness(options, prices)`](cleaning.qmd#add_spot_and_moneyness) | `DataFrame` | Merge spot price; compute moneyness and DTE |
| [`clean_holdings(df)`](cleaning.qmd#clean_holdings) | `DataFrame` | Normalize holdings column names and types |
| [`clean_earnings(df)`](cleaning.qmd#clean_earnings) | `DataFrame` | Parse and filter earnings dates |

---

## Analysis

Compute derived metrics from cleaned DataFrames. No raw fetching or
cleaning — pass cleaned DataFrames from the loaders or cleaning module.

[Full reference →](analysis.qmd)

| Function | Returns | Description |
|:---------|:--------|:------------|
| [`compute_put_call_ratios(options)`](analysis.qmd#compute_put_call_ratios) | `tuple[DataFrame, DataFrame]` | PCR by ticker and by ticker-expiration |
| [`compute_forward_returns(prices, windows)`](analysis.qmd#compute_forward_returns) | `DataFrame` | Add N-day forward return columns |
| [`compute_iv_skew(options, dte_range, atm_range, otm_range)`](analysis.qmd#compute_iv_skew) | `DataFrame` | IV skew = OTM put IV − ATM put IV |
| [`compute_earnings_proximity(holdings, earnings, today, top_n)`](analysis.qmd#compute_earnings_proximity) | `DataFrame` | Weight-normalized days until earnings |
